feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Integrate SAP S/4HANA on-premises with ActiveMQ on-premises using Edge Integration Cell
entry.content:
Hi,

We work with a private on-premises version of SAP S/4HANA and we would like to exchange events between that instance and some ActiveMQ queues (on-premises too).

The condition is that the messages/events stay on-premises and don't go outside on any hyperscalers' infrastructure.

We have a Kubernetes infrastructure on-premises too.

It seems that with such landscape it should be possible to configure a runtime with Edge Integration Cell on-premises, add a JSM or AMQP Adapter in the design of the intregration and then exchange events between the EIC and SAP S/4HANA.

Is it correct ?

Thanks

entry.title: clearing code to get generated in the bank format YFR_CGI_XML_CT for a creditor having Ireland bank
entry.content:
Hello,

We have a question, is it normal for the bank format YFR_CGI_XML_CT to generate a clearing code for bank country Irelande of the creditor. Is there any new version of bank format YFR_CGI_XML_CT that needs to be implemented to cater for this?

 

Kind regards,Virashma

entry.title: We are experiencing an issue regarding batch classification validation in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public
entry.content:
Dear Support Team,

We are experiencing an issue regarding batch classification validation in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition.

Current Configuration:

  1. We have created a characteristic and flagged it as a Required Entry.
  2. This characteristic is assigned to a Batch Class (Class Type 023), where it is also marked as a Required Entry (Class Overwrite).
  3. The Batch Class is assigned to the Material Master record.

The Issue:
When creating a Production Order (CO01) and generating a batch under the Goods Receipt tab, the standard Batch Classification dialog pop-up appears as expected. However, the system allows the user to completely bypass the mandatory characteristic entry. The user can close the pop-up or process past it without entering a value, and the system saves the production order.

Since the characteristic is explicitly flagged as a Required Entry, the system should enforce a hard block (Error) rather than a by passable Information.

We have also tested the scenario in CO11N. However, the system behavior remains the same.

Our Questions:

  1. Is there any standard configuration available in the Public Cloud edition to enforce a hard validation error for incomplete batch classification during order creation/release?
  2. If this is standard behaviour at the order creation stage, could you please provide the exact technical name of the cloud-ready BAdI (Business Add-In) or Enhancement Spot available to validate batch classification data upon saving the production order?

I have attached screenshots of our characteristic/class configuration and the order creation screen for your reference.

 

Regards, 

Shubham

entry.title: CK11N Picking Negative Procurement Price from Info Record (No PO Involved)
entry.content:
While executing cost estimate using CK11N, the system is determining a negative procurement price for a material.

  • The system correctly identifies the Purchasing Info Record (no Purchase Order is being picked).
  • However, the calculated price is negative, although:
    • The Info Record shows a positive price in ME13.
    • There is no PO involved in the valuation.
  • Valuation Variant:
    • Strategy: L – Price from Purchasing Info Record
    • Sub-strategy: B – Purchase Order Price via Condition Table
  • latest PO is return PO

entry.title: Spaces & Pages – Automatically hide empty pages for users
entry.content:
We are using SAP Fiori Spaces & Pages.

We would like to know whether standard SAP functionality exists to automatically hide a page from a user when the user does not have authorization to any applications on that page.

Current behavior:

The page remains visible even though the user has no accessible applications assigned to that page.

Questions:

1. Is this the expected standard behavior?

2. Is there a configuration option to suppress empty pages?

3. Is there an SAP Note, roadmap item, or recommended approach for this requirement?Please advise on the supported SAP solution.

entry.title: the memory drop down box appears but you are no longer able to click on it and use it.
entry.content: In multiple transactions, when the history / memory drop down appears when typing in a field, your history is appearing but you cannot select it. You click on it and it does nothing. We use to be able to click on it and it would take it into the box.

entry.title: Head Office & Branch in Customer Master
entry.content:
Dear,

Whenever we are booking customer (branch) invoice which is getting booked on head office id. This should not happen as per our requirement. say Branch customer--10 which is linked to parent/head office 50. whenever we are booking invoice/receipts, system posting to 50. To avoid this, there is an option of selecting + before the branch customer so that it pops whether you wan to go with head office or remove that so that it can post to Branch only by removing Head office number in the popup.

I have created a test case in the attached document from system.

Kindly help to setup the invoice and payments to Branch only whereas head office is required only for reporting purpose.

 

Thanks

entry.title: PFCG Role Generation After S/4HANA Upgrade: New T-Code Only or Full Authorization Reload?
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I am currently working on an SAP S/4HANA upgrade project from S/4HANA 2021 to S/4HANA 2023.

I have a question regarding role maintenance and authorization generation after the upgrade.

Question: 

The role already contains multiple T-codes.

After the upgrade (already run SU25 step 2a and 2b), if I add a new T-code to "Menu" tab of that role and then go to "Change Authorization Data" in "Authorizations" tab:

Will system only load the authorization objects related to the newly added T-code?
Or will system reload all authorization objects associated with every T-code contained in the role?

Any explanation regarding the role generation mechanism in PFCG would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you.

QuocDT5

entry.title: S4产生多张折旧凭证，ECC只有一张
entry.content: S4产生多张折旧凭证，ECC只有一张折旧凭证，用户不希望分多张折旧凭证

entry.title: API_PURCHASEORDER_2 error The relative URI of a batch operation is violating the construction rules
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

    We facing error when call Odata service Purchase Order API (OData V4) "The relative URI of a batch operation is violating the construction rules"

    Could you tell me what my wrong. the example payload as below 

service path /sap/opu/odata4/sap/api_purchaseorder_2/srvd_a2x/sap/purchaseorder/0001/$batch

accept    multipart/mixed
content-type    multipart/mixed;boundary=batch

--batch
Content-Type: multipart/mixed; boundary=changeset

--changeset
Content-Type: application/http
Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary
Content-ID: 1


DELETE PurchaseOrderItem/2120000001/2 HTTP/1.1
Content-Type: application/json

--changeset--

--batch--

entry.title: Unabel to do Partial capitalization in KO02
entry.content:
Dear Team,

While maintaining Settlement rule in KO02 getting error "Total percent = 50% (Set. Type FUL/Version / Actual settlement ).

We want to do partial capitalization of Asset but unable to do so. Please find attached error screenshot of the same.

entry.title: IHB100 and IHB200 - fields needs to be distribute through standard BP webservice
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have enabled the two SAP standard roles, IHB100 and IHB200.

We need to distribute the following fields from non-SAP to the S/4 systems through the standard BP web service (BUSINESSPARTNERSUITEBULKREPLIC/BusinessPartnerSUITEBulkReplicateRequest_In ).

IHB100 Role – Fields

  1. CREDIT_TAX_CODE
  2. CREDIT_TAX_TYPE
  3. DEBIT_TAX_CODE
  4. DEBIT_TAX_TYPE

IHB200 Role – Field

  1. BANK_AREA

We can see these fields in the BUT000 table.

However, we observed that these standard fields are not available in the SAP BP web service structure(MDG_BS_BP_S_EXTERN), in both the inbound and outbound structures.

If these fields are available in out standard structure, at least we can proceed with extending the web service accordingly and mapping in BADI.

 

Thanks

Ram

entry.title: Expertise--Request for Technical Information on PBD Status Change Date Storage
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

We have a business requirement to display the status change date of a PBD document in a Fiori application.

Requirement Details:

  • Example:
    • PBD document was in "In Process" status on 21-Jun-2026.
    • A user changed the status to "Rejected" on 23-Jun-2026.
  • We need to identify where SAP stores the status change information, specifically:
    • Status change date and time
    • Previous status and new status
    • User who performed the status change
    • Relevant database table(s) and field(s)

Our objective is to retrieve and display the status change date in a Fiori application. Therefore, we would like to understand:

  1. Which SAP table(s) store the PBD document status history?
  2. Which field contains the status change dat

entry.title: Previous period posting
entry.content:
Dear Team,

In MIGO transaction, how can we post with old posting date.

entry.title: Output Determination Issue (Dispatch Time)
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We have identified a strange behavior during the message output process , after changing the Purchase Order, despite the correct settings being maintained in transaction NACE.

In the details, for the order type ZTRA – Stock Transfer Order, for which changes have been applied in transaction NACE, the system continues to store the field “Dispatch Time” with value “3 - Send with application own transaction” instead of “4 - Send immediately (when saving the application)”, when a change is applied to the Purchase Order. As a consequence, the email is not automatically sent. Please find attached the evidences:

Comparison with Other Order Types: For order types:

  • ZODA – Standard PO
  • ZGEN – No-stock & Services

the system behaves as expected: upon modification of the Purchase Order, the output is determined with Dispatch Time = 4, and the email is successfully sent:

All Purchase Orders ZTRA, ZODA, and ZGEN use the same output type: “ZNIE – Purchase Order via email”:

The NACE settings for order type ZTRA (order type with issue) are as follows:

The NACE settings for order type ZODA (working order type) are as follows:

Could you please clarify why the output message for ZTRA is always set to Dispatch Time = 3, even though in NACE it is configured as 4?

Thank you in advance for your support,

Maria

entry.title: Posting period Issue
entry.content:
Dear Team,

In SBC,

There is a requirement, how to post the GR document with five months ago date.

entry.title: Unable to return valid error msg from SO enh to BAPI/OData response in S/4HANA.
entry.content:
We are updating Sales Orders via OData,

where the call flow is: CPI → OData Service → DPC Extension Class → BAPI_SALESORDER_CHANGE

Inside this BAPI execution, business validations are implemented in EXIT_SAPMV45A_003 (sales order processing includes).When a validation fails: We raise a hard-coded error message

(MESSAGE e...)The message is available in SY-MSG*

Execution stops immediately BAPI RETURN table is NOT populated

As a result, DPC Extension cannot capture the error CPI receives no meaningful error message

 

This makes it impossible to propagate validation errors back to the external system.

Actual Behavior

Messages raised in EXIT_SAPMV45A_003:Appear only in SY-MSG*

Do not reach BAPI RETURN Cause silent failure from OData perspective 

No standard BAdI / enhancement clearly supports returning validation messages for this scenario.

entry.title: deploy config issue in BAS
entry.content:
HI Team,

I am getting deploy-config issue in my BAS when I am trying touse command npm run deploy-config and getting ERR_INVALID_ARG_TYPE error. I used the commands mentioned in note: 3763944, but still issue remains. Please help.

entry.title: F881 doesn´t work properly
entry.content:
Hi,

We are trying to retire an asset using transaction F881,but the result is not as expected

We are getting this error:AA816. Transaction type doesn´t exist

Best Regards,

entry.title: Note 3754927 S4CORE
entry.content:
HI team ,

 

Need to know the note 3754927  is applicable for S4CORE version 108 or not ?
